microsoft_ft: Owned the **strategic roadmap** for Azure's internal resilience platform, sequencing near-term agent productivity wins alongside longer-horizon AI-enabled capabilities across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring Legal and Compliance alignment.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly paralleling AI-enabled operator assistance in a frontline platform context.

Defined adoption metrics and iterated on platform workflows post-launch, tracking agent productivity and operational quality signals to validate roadmap sequencing and surface friction in the execution pipeline.

Partnered with Operations leads through structured discovery — observing workflows firsthand and running stakeholder interviews — to identify root-cause inefficiencies and translate findings into **prioritized platform improvements**.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation tooling by conducting user demos and training across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and validating the feature's real-world operator impact.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with frontline engineering teams, uncovering underlying workflow friction beyond stated needs and securing roadmap inclusion of intent-based YAML generation.

Improved agent-facing data retrieval by migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search tool** with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing friction in day-to-day operator workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams with competing operational stakeholder needs.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, translating findings into a phased automation roadmap that addressed root-cause inefficiencies rather than surface-level requests.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the data visibility needed to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact workflows, and measure progress against platform goals.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, coordinating IT, Operations, and Engineering stakeholders end-to-end.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process — maintaining pace and quality through a complex platform transition.

Drove stakeholder alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs in the release workflow.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a CRM process that reduced agent friction and improved conversion at every funnel stage.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile using data on where prospective customers dropped off.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and quantify profitability patterns, translating raw operational data into a clear, actionable roadmap for pricing model changes.

skills_priority: User Research & Discovery (interviews, observation, root-cause analysis)
AI-Enabled Workflow Automation (AI agents, LLM-powered tools, semantic search)
Agile/Scrum Execution (end-to-end, sprint planning, backlog prioritization)
Product Metrics & Iteration (adoption, productivity, quality signals)
